leadText: Sandsear Storm (Japanese: ねっさのあらし Hot-Sand Storm) is a damage-dealing Ground-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Landorus.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Sandsear Storm inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of burning the target. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 5 Agile Strong Power 95 75 115 Accuracy 80% 80% 90% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 30% 30% 50% Turns 3 2 4 ? ? Inflicts the target with burn Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Sandsear Storm's PP was raised to 10 and its base power was increased to 100. It now has a 20% chance to burn each target. In battles with multiple opponents, Sandsear Storm targets all adjacent opponents. When used during rain , Sandsear Storm bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly . Sandsear Storm is a wind move .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user attacks by wrapping the target in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This also leaves the target with a burn. S V The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This may also leave them with a burn.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Sandsear Storm's description in Pokémon Legends: Arceus states that it "leaves the target with a burn", which erroneously implies that its additional effect is guaranteed. This error is not present in its variations' description.
